Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Speicakl Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $536.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Court ordered the hearing on defendant ANNA GARCOUSHA PORSHNIKOKK's demurrer OFF CALENDAR. Moot -- First Amended Complaint filed on October 5, 2005. (302/REQ/JU) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647
